steps.sql: SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t1 WHERE b=345 ORDER BY a;

EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN
  SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t1 WHERE d<>99 AND b=345 ORDER BY a;
SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t1 WHERE d<>99 AND b=345 ORDER BY a DESC;

EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN
  SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t1 WHERE d<>99 AND b=345 ORDER BY a DESC;
SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t1 WHERE c=6 ORDER BY a, b, c;

EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN
  SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t1 WHERE c=6 ORDER BY a, b, c;
steps.expect: {/* USING INDEX t1abc (ANY(a) AND ANY(b) AND c=?)*/}

steps.sql: SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t1 WHERE c IN (6,7) ORDER BY a, b, c;

EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN
  SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t1 WHERE c IN (6,7) ORDER BY a, b, c;
steps.expect: {/* USING INDEX t1abc (ANY(a) AND ANY(b) AND c=?)*/}

steps.sql: SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t1 WHERE c BETWEEN 6 AND 7 ORDER BY a, b, c;

EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN
  SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t1 WHERE c BETWEEN 6 AND 7 ORDER BY a, b, c;
steps.expect: {/* USING INDEX t1abc (ANY(a) AND ANY(b) AND c>? AND c<?)*/}

steps.sql:
SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t1 WHERE b IN (234, 345) AND c BETWEEN 6 AND 7
   ORDER BY a, b;

steps.expect: {/* USING INDEX t1abc (ANY(a) AND b=? AND c>? AND c<?)*/}

steps.sql: SELECT x, a, b, c, d, '|' FROM t1j LEFT JOIN t1 ON c=y ORDER BY +y, +a;
SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t2 WHERE d<>99 AND b=345 ORDER BY a;

EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN
  SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t2 WHERE d<>99 AND b=345 ORDER BY a;
SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t3 WHERE b=345 ORDER BY a;

EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN
  SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t3 WHERE b=345 ORDER BY a;

EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN
  SELECT * FROM t1
   WHERE (y = 'AB' AND x <= 4)
      OR (y = 'EF' AND x = 5);

EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN
  SELECT  * FROM t9a WHERE b IN (SELECT x FROM t9b WHERE y!=5);

EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN
  SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t6 WHERE d<>99 AND b=345 ORDER BY a;

EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN
  SELECT a,b,c,d,'|' FROM t6 WHERE d<>99 AND b=345 ORDER BY a DESC;
